summary: Frontend-only e2e testing of DialBox: Tap-to-Talk voice-mode switch + Dial 4 Adventure branching audio adventure (Starfall Station), plus regression on existing Lines (1,3,5,8). All 13 test scenarios PASSED.
critical_code_review_comments: PhoneSimulator.jsx is ~1162 lines — recommend splitting into per-line modules (adventure, mindline, magic8, knockknock, fortune) and extracting hooks (useIvrKeypad, useVoiceMode) for maintainability.
processDial catches generic errors and shows the same 'exchange error' message — consider surfacing distinct errors for network vs. server failures for easier debugging.
TTS speak() is fired-and-forgotten with no cancellation between rapid node transitions; users can hear stale audio if they choose quickly. Consider aborting/queuing the previous audio on new speak().
advChoose backToMenu() on r.error swallows the session and may confuse users; a soft in-place retry message would be nicer than dumping to main menu.
seed_data_creation: None — backend was pre-seeded by main agent (adventure program enabled).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Adventure text renders as soon as api.adventureStart resolves; wait for status label to change from CONNECTING (busy) before asserting new node text. Auto-dial is INTER_DIGIT_MS=1300ms after a single-digit keypress in dialtone mode. TTS audio does not block state updates. Voice-mode localStorage key is 'dialbox_voice_mode' (values: 'tap' | 'hold'). Real mic capture cannot be exercised in automation; only the UI switch was verified.
test_scenarios_passed: Default voice mode is 'Tap' with label 'TAP TO TALK'
Clicking Hold switch changes label to 'HOLD TO TALK'
Dial 4 auto-dials and connects to 'Dial 4 Adventure' → shows Starfall intro + choices (1 answer, 2 locker)
WIN path 2→1→1→1→2→1 reaches VICTORY ending with play-again prompt
Inventory line shows '🎒 you carry: flashlight, wrench' after locker
Item gating: 1→1→1 without wrench routes to stuck_wrench denied node (NOT an ending)
* replay in adventure re-renders/re-speaks the current node
0 from inside adventure returns to main DialBox menu
## quickly inside adventure opens END CALL? confirmation
LOSE path 1→1→3→1 reaches THE END (vent_dark) with play-again/main-menu
Regression: Dial 1 → Fortune Caller oracle list
Regression: Dial 3 → MindLine name input, Dial 5 → 'Knock, knock.', Dial 8 → Magic 8 question input
